message:
WMI-2 Type Confusion Leak: Field 'desc_count' read through pointer of type postproc_job in vgem_postproc_ctx_free(). This type is freed in postproc_job_reap() without invalidating all references. If memory is reclaimed by a different type, this read leaks attacker-controlled data.
WMI-2 Type Confusion Leak: Field 'desc_count' read through pointer of type postproc_job in vgem_postproc_ctx_free(). This type is freed in postproc_job_submit() without invalidating all references. If memory is reclaimed by a different type, this read leaks attacker-controlled data.
